title: Verdant graduation pass opening
body: Route C-iv: graduating seven 2026-05-09/05-10 distilled entries to their named permanent homes (principles.md x2, agent-collaboration.md x1, workflow.md x2, testing-tdd-recipes.md x1, jc-plan skill body x1). Plus tail-of-window ADR-181 status flip Proposed->Accepted. Following canonical step 7b - graduated entries get back-cites from destinations, then pruned from distilled.md. No commit window opened in this pass; outputs land in working tree alongside existing uncommitted Sylvan + Shadowed work for the owner's commit decision.
